name: statusline
description: Segment-based statusline for Claude Code: model | current task | directory | steward anchor (⚓ + inbox count in .steward projects) | context counter (the GSD-edition normalized bar — 100% = usable-window limit accounting for the ~16.5% autocompact buffer; green/yellow/orange/skull thresholds). Each segment is an independent fail-soft function — add new ones by dropping a function into SEGMENTS. Statusline is a settings-level surface, so wiring is one settings.json line: "statusLine": {"type": "command", "command": "node <path>/bin/mk-statusline.js"} — see README. No hooks, no skills.
